source.business_scenario: 删 stats 后误选 NL(应该选 Hash)
source.redaction_notes: Synthetic Pagila schema; no real customer data

input.sql:
DELETE STATISTICS payment;
SELECT /*+ nestloop(p c) */ COUNT(*)
FROM payment p, customer c
WHERE p.customer_id = c.customer_id
